title: Test 7
description: No-code test issue with 4 phases to exercise kanban board phase tracking

phases.title: Verify monorepo package structure
phases.description: Confirm the three main packages exist: packages/shared, packages/framework, and apps/desktop.
phases.verification: All three package directories exist with package.json files

phases.title: Verify framework commands
phases.description: Confirm all 7 core framework command files exist in packages/framework/commands/: get.md, review.md, plan.md, audit.md, execute.md, ship.md, yolo.md.

phases.title: Verify shared types
phases.description: Confirm the shared types directory contains state type definitions in packages/shared/src/types/.
phases.verification: Type files exist in the shared types directory

phases.title: Verify .tiki directory structure
phases.description: Confirm the .tiki directory has the expected structure: state.json, plans/ directory, and that the state file is valid JSON.
phases.verification: .tiki/state.json exists and is valid JSON, plans/ directory exists
